history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! I see you're ordering for two people, including a 13-year-old child. What would you like for yourself?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Для меня без молока (у меня непереносимость лактозы). Мальчику 13 лет — стандартный бургер. Спасибо!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it! For yourself, we'll prepare a milk-free burger to accommodate your lactose intolerance. For your 13-year-old, one standard burger. Let me confirm your full order: 1 milk-free burger and 1 standard burger. Is that correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Да, правильно. ~2878 ккал для всей группы. Спасибо!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect! Your order is confirmed: 1 lactose-free burger for you and 1 standard burger for your 13-year-old. Total calories: ~2,878. Would you like to add anything else today? 😊

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order (1 lactose-free burger + 1 standard burger) is ready. Enjoy your meal! 😊
